brandIterateMcpPath.label: brand_iterate MCP Path
brandIterateMcpPath.help: Path to brand-gen's Python MCP server entry point.

approvalMode.label: Approval Mode
approvalMode.help: How much human approval is required between autonomous heartbeat generations.

heartbeatIntervalMinutes.help: How often the Pi extension should run autonomous discover/generate cycles.

autoHeartbeat.label: Enable Heartbeat
autoHeartbeat.help: Automatically run heartbeat cycles on a timer during active Pi sessions.
